data.name: Account_Subtitle
data.value: Manage your profile, password and account status.

data.name: Account_ProfileSubtitle
data.value: Your main account information in AM Travel system.

data.name: Pwd_Subtitle
data.value: Keep your AM Travel account secure by updating your password regularly.

data.name: Pwd_FormSubtitle
data.value: Enter your current password, then choose a new secure password.

data.name: Pwd_TipsSubtitle
data.value: A strong password reduces the risk of account breaches and protects client data and bookings.

data.name: Pwd_Tip2
data.value: Mix uppercase, lowercase, numbers and symbols.

data.name: Pwd_Tip3
data.value: Do not use your phone number or name as a password.

data.name: Edit_Subtitle
data.value: Manage your profile, phone number, and national ID safely inside AM Travel.

data.name: Edit_FormSubtitle
data.value: Update only the fields you want to change, then save your changes.

data.name: Edit_NotesSubtitle
data.value: Make sure to enter correct data, as it is linked to bookings and account management inside the system.

data.name: Edit_Note1
data.value: Your phone number must be correct to avoid communication or booking errors.

data.name: Edit_Note2
data.value: Your national ID is required to verify account ownership inside the system.

data.name: Edit_Note3
data.value: Do not forget to click Save Changes before leaving the page.

data.name: CU_Subtitle
data.value: Add a new AM Travel account and assign the correct role for the user.

data.name: CU_FormSubtitle
data.value: Fill in the user information carefully before creating the account.

data.name: CU_NotesSubtitle
data.value: Make sure the username, phone number and national ID are not duplicated before creating the account.

data.name: CU_Note1
data.value: Admin account cannot be created here if one already exists.

data.name: CU_Note2
data.value: Choose Helper for a user who can manage bookings without deleting them.

data.name: CU_Note3
data.value: Choose Viewer for a user who only needs to view data based on permissions.

data.name: CU_RoleGuideText
data.value: Admin has full control. Helper can manage bookings. Viewer has limited read access.

data.name: Users_Subtitle
data.value: Manage AM Travel users, activation status, block status, and password reset operations.

data.name: Users_SearchPH
data.value: Search: phone, national ID, username, name, role...

data.name: Users_NoResults
data.value: No users found matching your search.

data.name: Users_ModalSubtitle
data.value: Review account information then set a new password.

data.name: Login_WelcomeSub
data.value: Sign in to access bookings, account data, user tools, and daily operations through a clean and secure AM Travel dashboard.

data.name: Login_FormSubtitle
data.value: Use your username, phone number, or national ID with your password.

data.name: Dash_Subtitle
data.value: Manage today work, customer follow-up, exports, and AM Travel operations.

data.name: Dash_NoWork
data.value: No registered work found for this date.

data.name: Err_403_Body
data.value: You do not have permission to open this page.

data.name: Err_404_Body
data.value: The page you requested was not found.

data.name: Home_ArabicNote
data.value: AM Travel is your destination for organizing domestic trips and hotel bookings in an organized and easy way.

data.name: Home_SlideHotelSub
data.value: Comfortable stays and organized travel plans.

data.name: Home_SlideTourSub
data.value: Beautiful programs for Hurghada, Marsa Alam, and more.

data.name: Home_SlideMemSub
data.value: Moments designed with care and attention.

data.name: Home_SlideVideoSub
data.value: Watch highlights from our travel atmosphere.

data.name: Home_AboutHeading
data.value: An organized tourism system and a more professional booking experience

data.name: Home_AboutSub
data.value: The page is designed to reflect the identity of a real travel company.

data.name: Home_Card1Body
data.value: Organize hotel reservations and follow up on client and trip details.

data.name: Home_Card2Body
data.value: Coordinated domestic trips to Egypt's tourist cities.

data.name: Home_Card3Body
data.value: Fast communication and online booking with continuous follow-up.

data.name: Home_ContactHeading
data.value: Get in touch with AM Travel

data.name: Home_ContactSub
data.value: Official contact details, company location and social media links.

data.name: Home_LocationAddr
data.value: Al-Namis Street, Second Section Asyut, Asyut Governorate 71111

data.name: Home_LocationDetail
data.value: Asyut - Al-Namis Street in front of the Y Club next to Saint Claus, Asyut, Egypt

data.name: Work_CreateSubtitle
data.value: Register a client transaction and set the next action date.

data.name: Work_EditSubtitle
data.value: Update client transaction details and next action date.

data.name: WL_Subtitle
data.value: Manage daily client transactions, notes, and next action dates.

data.name: WT_Subtitle
data.value: Works created today or scheduled to be done today.

data.name: WR_Subtitle
data.value: View works for any user. Admin can view all data but can edit or delete only his own works.

data.name: Co_Subtitle
data.value: Manage transportation companies, phone numbers, and active status.

data.name: Co_FilterPH
data.value: Search by company name or phone...

data.name: CoEdit_Subtitle
data.value: Update company phone number, notes, and active status.

data.name: CoCreate_Subtitle
data.value: Add a transportation company with phone number and notes.

data.name: Bus_Subtitle
data.value: Manage buses, status, plate numbers, routes, and saved layouts.

data.name: Bus_ConfirmAllSeats
data.value: All passenger seats are inactive. This bus will be deactivated. Continue?

data.name: CBus_Subtitle
data.value: Draw seats, VIP seats, assistant, driver, aisle, doors and bathroom manually.

data.name: CBus_HintText
data.value: Left click to draw. Right click any object to toggle Active / Inactive.

data.name: CBus_SizeNote
data.value: Increasing Rows or Columns will not delete the existing design.

data.name: CBus_AlertDoorEdge
data.value: Door can be placed only on first or last column.

data.name: CBus_AlertDoorType
data.value: Door can be added only on Normal/VIP/Empty side cell.

data.name: CBus_AlertNoSeats
data.value: You must draw at least one passenger seat.

data.name: EBus_Subtitle
data.value: Edit bus name, plate number, notes, status, and full bus design.

data.name: EBus_HintText
data.value: Left click to draw. Right click any object to toggle Active / Inactive. Increasing Rows or Columns will not delete the existing design.

data.name: EBus_AlertDoorEdge
data.value: Door can be placed only on first or last column.

data.name: EBus_AlertDoorType
data.value: Door can be added only on Normal/VIP/Empty side cell.

data.name: EBus_AlertNoSeats
data.value: You must draw at least one passenger seat.

data.name: Trips_Subtitle
data.value: Create daily bus trips and monitor reserved / available seats.

data.name: Seats_Subtitle
data.value: Bus layout, reserved seats, phone numbers, and booking payment details.

data.name: CTIndex_Subtitle
data.value: Link trips to companies and monitor daily schedules.

data.name: CTIndex_NoTrips
data.value: No available trips for the current selection.

data.name: CTIndex_SelectBoth
data.value: Select company and date to view linked trips.

data.name: CTIndex_NoLinked
data.value: No trips linked for the selected date.

data.name: CTIndex_ErrNoBoth
data.value: Please select both Go and Return trips.

data.name: CTIndex_ConfirmDelete
data.value: Delete this link? If round trip, both will be removed.

data.name: CTAcct_Subtitle
data.value: Search trips, manage prices, payments, and export reports.

data.name: CTIndex_SubtitleFull
data.value: Manage company trip booking. Link trips, monitor today's schedule.

data.name: CTIndex_SelectFirst
data.value: Select company and date, then click Load Trips.

data.name: CTIndex_SelectCoFirst
data.value: Select a company to view linked trips.

data.name: CTIndex_NoLinkedTrips
data.value: No trips linked for selected date.

data.name: CTIndex_ErrSelectCoFirst
data.value: Select company and click Load Trips first.

data.name: CTIndex_ErrNotDep
data.value: This is not a Go trip.

data.name: CTIndex_ErrNotRet
data.value: This is not a Return trip.

data.name: CTIndex_ConfirmDel
data.value: Delete this trip link? If round trip, both will be removed.

data.name: SB_FallbackInfo
data.value: No direct trip was found. You can create a new trip for this route.

data.name: SB_HintDelete
data.value: Selected bookings will be deleted if allowed.

data.name: SB_NoSeatsWarning
data.value: No seats are available for transfer.

data.name: SB_SelectRoute
data.value: Select a route to show available buses.

data.name: SB_SubtitleRole
data.value: Manage company seats, transfers, and searches from one place.

data.name: CSA_Subtitle
data.value: View company accounts, payments, and export PDF / Excel.

data.name: CSA_SelectPrompt
data.value: Select a company to display the account.

data.name: BkList_Subtitle
data.value: Manage hotel bookings, transportation, payments, and client details.

data.name: BkList_ScrollHint
data.value: Scroll horizontally to see all columns.

data.name: DW_Subtitle
data.value: Manage daily transport trips, hotel check-in/check-out, customer contacts, and remaining payments.

data.name: DW_EmptyTransport
data.value: No transport bookings found for this day.

data.name: DW_EmptyHotel
data.value: No hotel bookings found for this day.

data.name: CB_Subtitle
data.value: Create hotel, transportation, or combined booking in one clean workflow.

data.name: CB_ModeDesc
data.value: Hotel only shows hotel dates and rooms. Transportation only shows trip dates, buses, and seats. Combined shows both sections together.

data.name: CB_ModeHotelDesc
data.value: Hotel rooms, nights, children, payments, and phones.

data.name: CB_ModeTransportDesc
data.value: Trip type, go date, return date, buses, seats, and prices.

data.name: CB_ModeBothDesc
data.value: Hotel booking with transportation in the same page.

data.name: CB_HotelRoomsSub
data.value: Complete the current room row before adding a new one

data.name: CB_TransportationSub
data.value: Choose route, bus, then select seats

data.name: CB_GoRequiredSeatsNote
data.value: Buses list will show buses with enough available seats only.

data.name: CB_ReturnRequiredSeatsNote
data.value: For Round Trip, enter the return seats count separately.

data.name: CB_PaymentsSub
data.value: Paid amount cannot be greater than grand total

data.name: CB_JsCheckoutAfterCheckin
data.value: Check out must be at least one day after check in.

data.name: CB_JsSeatLocationHint
data.value: Enter pickup/drop-off for these selected seats. This is separate from the bus route.

data.name: CB_JsSeatsExceedRequired
data.value: {0} selected seats cannot exceed required seats count ({1}).

data.name: CB_JsLoadingBuses
data.value: Loading buses with at least {0} available seats...

data.name: CB_JsNoBusSeats
data.value: No bus has {0} available seats for this route/date.

data.name: CB_JsFoundBuses
data.value: Found {0} bus(es). Select a bus to show seats.

data.name: CB_JsBusOnlyHas
data.value: This bus has only {0} available seats. Please choose another bus.

data.name: CB_JsSeatsMustEqual
data.value: {0} selected seats must equal required seats count ({1}).

data.name: CB_JsSeatPricePositive
data.value: {0} {1} seat price must be greater than zero.

data.name: CB_JsRoomRowCount
data.value: Room row {0}: count must be greater than zero.

data.name: CB_JsRoomRowPrice
data.value: Room row {0}: night price must be greater than zero.

data.name: CB_JsPhoneRowRequired
data.value: Phone row {0}: phone number is required.

data.name: CB_JsPhoneRowIncorrect
data.value: Phone row {0}: phone number is incorrect.

data.name: CB_JsOnePrimaryRequired
data.value: One primary phone number is required.

data.name: CB_JsPaymentRowNegative
data.value: Payment row {0}: amount cannot be negative.

data.name: CB_JsPaidExceedsGrand
data.value: Paid amount cannot be greater than grand total.

data.name: CB_JsCountPositive
data.value: Count must be greater than zero.

data.name: CB_JsNightPricePositive
data.value: Night price must be greater than zero.

data.name: CB_JsAmountPositive
data.value: Amount must be greater than zero before adding a new row.

data.name: BkDet_NoSeats
data.value: No seats found for this trip.

data.name: BkDet_JsConnectFailed
data.value: Failed to connect to the server.

data.name: AUD_Subtitle
data.value: All changes, who made them, when, and what values changed.

data.name: AUD_NoLogs
data.value: No audit logs found for this booking.

data.name: EB_Subtitle
data.value: Only hotel dates, nights, hotel name, rooms, children, trip type, travel dates, and phones.

data.name: EB_AllowedChangesDesc
data.value: This page intentionally does not edit rooms structure, payments, buses, or seats. Payments, buses, seats, client name, notes, and booking identity remain exactly as they were.

data.name: EB_InfoNote
data.value: Editing the number of days or hotel dates recalculates the hotel total using the existing rooms and prices. Editing trip type only enables or disables existing Go/Return reservations. It does not create new seats or change buses.

data.name: EB_HotelAllowedSub
data.value: Hotel name, check-in, check-out, nights, rooms, children, and Admin discount

data.name: EB_TransportAllowedSub
data.value: Trip type and travel dates only

data.name: EB_RoomsBookingSub
data.value: You can edit room type, room count, and night price

data.name: EB_ChildrenSub
data.value: You can edit children count by age

data.name: EB_PhoneNumbersSub
data.value: You can add, remove, or change phone numbers

data.name: EB_JsCheckoutAfterCheckin
data.value: Check out must be at least one day after check in.

data.name: EB_JsRoomCountPositive
data.value: Room count must be greater than zero.

data.name: EB_JsRoomPriceNegative
data.value: Room night price cannot be negative.

data.name: EB_JsPhoneRequiredAdd
data.value: Phone number is required before adding another phone.

data.name: EB_JsNightsAtLeastOne
data.value: Nights count must be at least 1.

data.name: EB_JsRoomRowCount
data.value: Room row {0}: count must be greater than zero.

data.name: EB_JsRoomRowPrice
data.value: Room row {0}: night price cannot be negative.

data.name: EB_JsChild6Negative
data.value: Children until 6 years cannot be negative.

data.name: EB_JsChild12Negative
data.value: Children until 12 years cannot be negative.

data.name: EB_JsCheckoutAfter
data.value: Check out must be after check in.

data.name: EB_JsPhoneRowRequired
data.value: Phone row {0}: phone number is required.

data.name: EB_JsPhoneRowIncorrect
data.value: Phone row {0}: phone number is incorrect.

data.name: EB_JsOnePrimaryRequired
data.value: One primary phone number is required.
